title: Mediterranean Pasta Bake
description: A flavorful pasta dish with a crispy top, perfect for a weeknight dinner. The mediterranean flavors of feta cheese, olives, and sun-dried tomatoes add depth and excitement to this easy pasta bake.
instructions: Cook pasta according to package directions and set aside.
Cut the flaky pastry into 1-inch squares.
In a large bowl, combine cooked pasta, feta cheese, olives, sun-dried tomatoes, and butter.
Stir until the pasta is well coated.
Transfer the pasta mixture to a baking dish.
Top with pastry squares, overlapping them slightly.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown.
Let the dish rest for 5 minutes before serving.
